testcase.name: Admin Access › should show admin nav link for admin users
Admin Access › should redirect non-admin user away from /admin
Admin Access › should allow admin user to access /admin
Authentication - Login › should render the login form
Authentication - Login › should show error for invalid credentials
Authentication - Login › should not submit form with empty email
Authentication - Login › should not submit form with empty password
Authentication - Login › should navigate to register page
Authentication - Login › should have sign in heading and form fields
Authentication - Login › should show email confirmation required error for unconfirmed emails
Chat - Messaging › should display conversation list with multiple items
Chat - Messaging › should display conversations for logged-in user
Chat - Messaging › should send a message in conversation
Chat - Messaging › should have unread badge visible for conversations with unread messages
Chat - Messaging › should have accessible message input after selecting conversation
Chat - Messaging › should navigate back to conversation list from active conversation
Chat - Messaging › should display conversation header with call buttons
Chat - Messaging › should display file attachment button
Chat - Messaging › should display camera button
Chat - Messaging › should display voice recording button
Chat - Messaging › should display chat menu with options
Chat - Messaging › should display message status indicator
Chat - Messaging › should display reaction picker on message hover
Listings - Browse & Search › should display listing cards
Listings - Browse & Search › should filter by keyword search
Listings - Browse & Search › should filter by category
Listings - Browse & Search › should show location filter in filters panel
Listings - Browse & Search › should filter by price range
Listings - Browse & Search › should show empty state for no results
Listings - Browse & Search › should navigate to listing detail on card click
Listings - Browse & Search › should have accessible search input
